task_completion.description: Create the '7-Point Satisfaction Scale' label set
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a label set named '7-Point Satisfaction Scale' in the LimeSurvey label sets list or editor, containing codes 1-7 from Very Dissatisfied to Very Satisfied.

task_completion.description: Create the '5-Point Purchase Intent Scale' label set
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a label set named '5-Point Purchase Intent Scale' in the LimeSurvey label sets list or editor, containing codes 1-5 from Definitely Would Not Buy to Definitely Would Buy.

task_completion.description: Create the survey with the correct title and welcome message
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Q4 2024 Product Concept Test - Sparkling Water Line' in the survey overview or settings, along with the specified welcome message about the product concept evaluation.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Product Appeal' group and Q_APPEAL array question
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Product Appeal' containing a mandatory array question with code 'Q_APPEAL'. It should use the 7-point scale label set and have 6 sub-questions (SQ001-SQ006).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Purchase Likelihood' group and Q_PURCHASE array question
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Purchase Likelihood' containing a mandatory array question with code 'Q_PURCHASE'. It should use the 5-point scale label set and have 4 sub-questions (SQ001-SQ004).

task_completion.description: Ensure the survey is activated and anonymized
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for indicators that the survey is active (e.g., a 'Stop this survey' button or active status badge) and check the participant settings to verify that responses are set to be anonymized.

integrity.description: Agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to create the survey and label sets
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey admin web interface in a browser, not a text editor or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL injection, PHP scripts, or direct database manipulation to create the survey.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered the required text rather than just displaying the prompt
integrity.visual_evidence: Text fields in the LimeSurvey interface should be filled out with the required titles, questions, and welcome messages, rather than just having the task description open in a separate window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title must be exactly 'Q4 2024 Product Concept Test - Sparkling Water Line'. Two label sets are required: '7-Point Satisfaction Scale' and '5-Point Purchase Intent Scale'. The survey must contain exactly 2 question groups ('Product Appeal', 'Purchase Likelihood') and 2 array questions (Q_APPEAL, Q_PURCHASE). The survey must be both activated and set to anonymized responses.
